loading.title: We are syncing your payment
loading.description: Your checkout is complete. We are waiting for the payment provider to confirm the order and update your account.
loading.note: This usually takes a few seconds. You can keep this page open or check your balance in another tab.

success.title: Your purchase is ready
success.creditsDescription: {{count}} credits have been added to your account.
success.subscriptionDescription: Your subscription is active and the credits for this cycle are now available.

timeout.title: The provider is still confirming this order
timeout.description: We have not received the final confirmation yet. Your payment may still complete normally, so check your balance first or refresh in a moment.

error.title: We could not confirm this payment
error.description: There was a problem checking the payment result.
error.canceledDescription: This checkout was canceled before the payment completed.
error.notFoundDescription: We could not find a matching local order for this return URL.
error.missingReference: Missing payment reference. Please try again from the pricing page.
